memorydb.subnetgroup.Description.Description: A description of the subnet group.

memorydb.subnetgroup.SubnetGroupName.Description: The name of the subnet group to be used for the cluster.

memorydb.subnetgroup.SubnetIds.Description: A list of Amazon VPC subnet IDs for the subnet group.

memorydb.subnetgroup.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
